data.summary: bias_ema merge (a094356) coupled DR/fault obs-noise base_std + apply_bias_ema_obs to observation_noise_model.noise_cfg; eval nulls that model -> ALL evals crashed (e1 at albc_env.py:512, e2 at config.py:621). Fixed: _obs_noise_base_std() reconstructs std from _OBS_NOISE_STD constant when model is None (e1 byte-identical to pre-merge constant-read = baseline-eval parity; e2 72D via +3 zeros); apply_bias_ema_obs bumps space unconditionally but guards noise-tuple extension on present model. 10 unit tests pass incl new model-None guard. code-reviewer opus found the config.py companion site.
data.e2_eval_note: eval.py has no env-yaml restore of use_bias_ema_obs (reviewer); e2 eval likely needs env.use_bias_ema_obs=true override - VERIFY before running e2 eval.
